exercises.sentence: Yo ______ tomar un café con mis amigos esta tarde.
exercises.translation: I want to have a coffee with my friends this afternoon.

exercises.sentence: Aunque es tarde, yo ______ terminar este libro hoy.
exercises.translation: Although it is late, I want to finish this book today.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ aprender a tocar la guitarra este verano.
exercises.translation: I want to learn to play the guitar this summer.

exercises.sentence: Ayer, yo ______ comprar pan, pero la tienda estaba cerrada.
exercises.translation: Yesterday, I tried to buy bread, but the store was closed.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ estudiar mucho anoche para el examen final.
exercises.translation: I tried to study a lot last night for the final exam.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ver la película, pero me quedé dormido.
exercises.translation: I tried to watch the movie, but I fell asleep.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo siempre ______ jugar en el parque.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I always wanted to play in the park.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ser astronauta cuando era pequeño.
exercises.translation: I wanted to be an astronaut when I was little.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo ______ vivir en una ciudad grande.
exercises.translation: Before, I wanted to live in a big city.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ir a España si tuviera suficiente dinero.
exercises.translation: I would want to go to Spain if I had enough money.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ aprender francés si tuviera más tiempo libre.
exercises.translation: I would want to learn French if I had more free time.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ayudarte, pero no sé cómo hacerlo.
exercises.translation: I would like to help you, but I do not know how to do it.

exercises.sentence: El próximo año, yo ______ viajar a muchos países diferentes.
exercises.translation: Next year, I will want to travel to many different countries.

exercises.sentence: Algún día, yo ______ tener una casa cerca del mar.
exercises.translation: Someday, I will want to have a house near the sea.

exercises.sentence: Cuando termine la carrera, yo ______ buscar un buen trabajo.
exercises.translation: When I finish my degree, I will want to look for a good job.
